auth.title: Sign in
auth.intro: Use your account or an FNMT certificate to continue.
auth.support: If you need help, contact technical support.

status.formReady: Validation passed. Connect this form to your secure backend to continue.

certificate.hint: The secure certificate route will open. If the browser finds an installed FNMT certificate, it will show its native selector.
certificate.unavailable: FNMT certificate access is only available in a desktop browser.
